name: The Island: Exterminatus
short_description: A futuristic game, with lots of beatings, in the best Pancadaria style! Punch down several enemies in an underground atmosphere through cyberpunk places! Use kicking, punching, grabbing techniques or even weapons, such as daggers, nunchucks, whips, grenades, pistols, etc.
detailed_description:
This game is a typical BEAT UP in the 80s style, with a good availability of blows in an intense storyline. Your mission is to help Azax, our hero, take revenge on an environmental NGO he was part of. To do this, he will attack the faction on several fronts, wiping out its leaders one by one. The game takes place in the city of Belém, on the eve of COP 30, and an environment threatened by possible political attacks from a criminal organization.

There are various weapons available like knives, Nunchako, grenades as well as powerful firearms. In some levels, it is possible to perform takedowns, eliminating your enemies with single, merciless blows. Welcome to Belém! Success in Exterminatus' Dark Odyssey!
